hooks.command: test -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}/.claude/pm-ledger.md" && command -v pm-agent >/dev/null 2>&1 && (cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}" && pm-agent context 2>/dev/null) || true
test -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}/.claude/pm-ledger.md" && command -v pm-agent >/dev/null 2>&1 && pm-agent check-update 2>/dev/null || true
test -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}/.claude/pm-ledger.md" && command -v pm-agent >/dev/null 2>&1 && (cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}" && pm-agent refresh >/dev/null 2>&1 &) || true
test -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}/.claude/pm-ledger.md" && command -v pm-agent >/dev/null 2>&1 && (cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}" && pm-agent observe) || true
